payload.input: Julian smiles, showing teeth, and turns her toward the camera, positioning her in front of the lens so that her reflection appears in the small flip-screen. He stands behind her, his body a wall of heat and wool, his erection pressing hard against the small of her back, heavy and thick through the fabric, a weight that makes her knees weak. "It means making sure the camera sees how pink you are," Julian murmurs, his hands sliding under her dress, finding the waistband of her shorts and dragging them down her legs with a slow, deliberate friction. "How wet. How young."
